mapper.sql: rf.id, rf.task_id, rf.image_id, i.image_name, i.deleted_at AS image_deleted_at, t.task_type, t.task_name, rf.file_name, rf.file_type, rf.owner_id, rf.visibility, rf.workspace, rf.store_name, rf.layer_name, rf.published_at, rf.created_at, rf.updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rs_result_file rf LEFT JOIN rs_task t ON t.id = rf.task_id LEFT JOIN rs_image i ON i.id = rf.image_id WHERE rf.id = #{id} AND rf.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND rf.layer_name IS NOT NULL AND rf.layer_name != '' AND rf.workspace IS NOT NULL AND rf.workspace != '' AND (rf.visibility = 'PUBLIC' OR rf.owner_id = #{currentUserId})
